image:image.image:title: Abnormal vehicle parking reservation (R317-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for abnormal vehicles only.

image:image.image:title: Abnormal vehicle reservation (R317) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This route is reserved for abnormal/oversized vehicles (loads exceeding normal size/mass limits).

image:image.image:title: Advance Exit Direction — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: Advance Exit Direction

image:image.image:title: Animal-drawn vehicles prohibited (R227) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Vehicles drawn by animals (e.g. carts, donkey carts) are not permitted here.

image:image.image:title: Authorised vehicle parking reservation (R324-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for authorised vehicles only (e.g. diplomatic corps).

image:image.image:title: Authorised vehicle reservation (R324) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This lane or bay is reserved for authorised vehicles only (e.g. government, municipal).

image:image.image:title: Beginning of dual carriageway (W214) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The road ahead divides into two separate one-way carriageways (dual carriageway begins).

image:image.image:title: Bus and midibus lane reservation begins (R332) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Marks where the traffic lane reserved for buses and midibuses begins.

image:image.image:title: Bus and midibus parking reservation (R330-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for buses and midibuses only.

image:image.image:title: Bus and midibus reservation (R330) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This lane or bay is reserved for buses and midibuses only.

image:image.image:title: Bus and minibus lane reservation begins (R329) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Marks where the traffic lane reserved for buses and minibuses begins.

image:image.image:title: Bus and minibus lane reservation (R328) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This traffic lane is reserved for buses and minibuses only — no other class may use it.

image:image.image:title: Bus and minibus parking reservation (R327-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for buses and minibuses only.

image:image.image:title: Bus and minibus reservation (R327) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This lane or bay is reserved for buses and minibuses only.

image:image.image:title: Bus, midibus and minibus parking reservation (R333-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for buses, midibuses and minibuses only.

image:image.image:title: Bus, midibus and minibus lane reservation begins (R335) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Marks where the traffic lane reserved for buses, midibuses and minibuses begins.

image:image.image:title: Bus, midibus and minibus lane reservation (R334) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This traffic lane is reserved for buses, midibuses and minibuses only.

image:image.image:title: Bus, midibus and minibus reservation (R333) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This lane or bay is reserved for buses, midibuses and minibuses (public transport vehicles).

image:image.image:title: Bus stop reservation (R325) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This stopping area is reserved for buses to pick up and drop off passengers.

image:image.image:title: Children ahead (W308) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Children are likely to be near the road (near schools or play areas).

image:image.image:title: Combined curve (left then right) (W210) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Two sharp bends in quick succession — first left, then right (S-bend).

image:image.image:title: Combined curve (right then left) (W211) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Two sharp bends in quick succession — first right, then left (reverse S-bend).

image:image.image:title: Construction vehicle parking reservation (R315-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for construction vehicles only.

image:image.image:title: Construction vehicle reservation (R315) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This road or area is reserved for construction vehicles only.

image:image.image:title: Crossroad ahead (W101) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A crossroad (4-way junction) ahead where you do not have priority.

image:image.image:title: Cyclists ahead (W309) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Cyclists are likely to be on or near the road ahead.

image:image.image:title: Dead-end / road closed chevron (W410) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The road does not continue beyond the sign — a turn left or right must be made.

image:image.image:title: Delivery vehicle parking reservation (R312-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for delivery vehicles only.

image:image.image:title: Delivery vehicle reservation (R312) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This road or area is reserved for delivery vehicles only.

image:image.image:title: Disabled persons vehicle parking reservation (R323-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for vehicles displaying a valid disabled person disc.

image:image.image:title: Disabled persons parking (R351(D)) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking space is reserved for vehicles displaying a valid disabled person disc.

image:image.image:title: Drift (W350) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A drift (ford/low-water crossing) ahead — the road crosses a watercourse at road level.

image:image.image:title: Electrical shock (W361) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Risk of electrical shock — overhead power lines or electrical equipment near the road.

image:image.image:title: Emergency flashing light (W346) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A flashing amber beacon ahead — used at roadworks, oversize vehicles, or emergency scenes.

image:image.image:title: Emergency vehicle parking reservation (R321-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for emergency vehicles only.

image:image.image:title: Emergency vehicle reservation (R321) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This lane or bay is reserved for emergency vehicles (ambulance, fire engine, police) only.

image:image.image:title: End of dual carriageway (W215) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The dual carriageway ends ahead. Road becomes a single two-way road.

image:image.image:title: Exit Direction — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: Exit Direction

image:image.image:title: Falling rocks (W334) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Rocks may fall onto the road from cliffs or embankments ahead.

image:image.image:title: Fingerboard — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: Fingerboard

image:image.image:title: Gentle curve (left) (W202) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A gentle (less severe) left curve ahead.

image:image.image:title: Gentle curve (right) (W203) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A gentle (less severe) right curve ahead.

image:image.image:title: Goods vehicle parking reservation (R313-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for goods vehicles only.

image:image.image:title: Goods vehicle over GVM parking reservation (R314-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for goods vehicles over the gross vehicle mass (GVM) shown.

image:image.image:title: Goods vehicle over GVM reservation (R314) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This road or area is reserved for goods vehicles over the gross vehicle mass (GVM) shown.

image:image.image:title: Goods vehicle reservation (R313) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This road or area is reserved for goods vehicles only.

image:image.image:title: Hairpin bend (left) (W206) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: An extremely sharp hairpin bend to the left ahead — more severe than a sharp bend.

image:image.image:title: Hairpin bend (right) (W207) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: An extremely sharp hairpin bend to the right ahead.

image:image.image:title: Hawkers prohibited (R241) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Street trading (hawking) is not permitted in this area.

image:image.image:title: Height limit (R204) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Vehicles exceeding the stated height may not use this road or pass this point.

image:image.image:title: High occupancy vehicle parking reservation (R320-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for high occupancy vehicles (carrying the minimum number of occupants shown).

image:image.image:title: High occupancy vehicle reservation (R320) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This lane is reserved for high-occupancy vehicles (vehicles with a minimum number of occupants).

image:image.image:title: Horse riders prohibited (R228) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Horse riding is not permitted on this road.

image:image.image:title: Centre line (broken) (RM1) — South African road marking
image:image.image:caption: Separates traffic flowing in opposite directions on a two-lane road.

image:image.image:title: Lane reduction ahead (W115) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The number of lanes ahead is reduced. Merge early.

image:image.image:title: Left-hand lane ends (W118) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The left-hand lane ends ahead. Traffic in that lane must merge right.

image:image.image:title: Side road junction (left) (W105) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A minor side road joins from the left ahead.

image:image.image:title: Left turn prohibited (R211) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Turning left is prohibited at THIS intersection.

image:image.image:title: Length limit (15 m) (R206) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Vehicles or combinations exceeding the stated length may not use this road.

image:image.image:title: Proceed left only (R105) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: You must proceed to the left at this intersection — straight or right turns are prohibited.

image:image.image:title: Proceed right only (R106) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: You must proceed to the right at this intersection — straight or left turns are prohibited.

image:image.image:title: Midibus parking reservation (R311-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for midibuses only.

image:image.image:title: Midibus reservation (R311) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This road or lane is reserved for midibuses only.

image:image.image:title: Minibus parking reservation (R310-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for minibuses only.

image:image.image:title: Minibus reservation (R310) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This road or lane is reserved for minibuses only.

image:image.image:title: Minibus stop reservation (R326) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This stopping area is reserved for minibuses to pick up and drop off passengers.

image:image.image:title: Minimum speed (R101) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: You must NOT drive slower than the speed shown.

image:image.image:title: Motor car reservation (R308) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This road or lane is reserved for motor cars only.

image:image.image:title: Motor car parking reservation (R308-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for motor cars only.

image:image.image:title: Motor cars only (R117) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Only motorcars (light motor vehicles) may use this lane or road.

image:image.image:title: Motor cycles only (R116) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Only motorcycles may use this lane or road.

image:image.image:title: Motorcycles prohibited (R224) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Motorcycles are not permitted on this road or section.

image:image.image:title: Overhead Direction — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: Overhead Direction

image:image.image:title: Overhead Supplement Exit Through Direction — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: Overhead Supplement Exit Through Direction

image:image.image:title: Overtaking by goods vehicles prohibited (R215) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Goods vehicles (trucks) may not overtake other vehicles here.

image:image.image:title: Overtaking prohibited (R214) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Overtaking of moving vehicles is prohibited for 500 m or until the end sign.

image:image.image:title: Painted islands (GM2) — South African road marking
image:image.image:caption: Hatched or painted area that separates traffic flows. Do not drive over it.

image:image.image:title: Pay toll (R132) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: You must stop and pay a toll fee at the booth ahead.

image:image.image:title: Pedal cycles and pedestrians only (R112) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Only pedal cyclists and pedestrians may use this path or road.

image:image.image:title: Pedal cycles prohibited (R225) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Pedal cycles (bicycles) are not permitted on this road.

image:image.image:title: Pedestrian crossing lines (RTM3) — South African road marking
image:image.image:caption: An uncontrolled pedestrian crossing. Pedestrians have right of way when using it.

image:image.image:title: Pedestrian crossing ahead (W306) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: An uncontrolled pedestrian crossing is ahead.

image:image.image:title: Pedestrians ahead (W307) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Pedestrians may be in or near the road ahead — no formal crossing.

image:image.image:title: Pedestrians prohibited (R226) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Pedestrians may not walk on this road or section.

image:image.image:title: Priority crossroad (W102) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A crossroad ahead where YOU have priority over crossing traffic.

image:image.image:title: Cyclists only (R111) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This lane or road is reserved for pedal cyclists only.

image:image.image:title: Animal-drawn vehicles only (R131) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This lane is reserved for animal-drawn vehicles only.

image:image.image:title: Taxis only (R118) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This lane is reserved for taxis (minibus taxis) only.

image:image.image:title: End of speed limit (R201-600) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The speed limit previously indicated no longer applies. The national default speed limit for the road type resumes.

image:image.image:title: End of prohibition of overtaking (R214-600) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The prohibition on overtaking previously in force has ended. Overtaking is now permitted where safe.

image:image.image:title: End of prohibition of overtaking by goods vehicles (R215-600) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Goods vehicles may now overtake again — the previous R215 restriction has ended.

image:image.image:title: End of all prohibitions (R600) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: All previously indicated special prohibitions on this road have ended. Normal traffic rules resume.

image:image.image:title: Axle mass limit (R203) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: No vehicle with a mass exceeding the indicated mass per axle may proceed.

image:image.image:title: Goods vehicles prohibited (R229) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Goods vehicles (trucks carrying freight) are prohibited from this road.

image:image.image:title: Rickshaw parking reservation (R318-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for rickshaws only.

image:image.image:title: Rickshaw reservation (R318) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This road or area is reserved for rickshaws only.

image:image.image:title: Right-hand lane ends (W117) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The right-hand lane ends ahead. Traffic in that lane must merge left.

image:image.image:title: Side road junction (right) (W106) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A minor side road joins from the right ahead.

image:image.image:title: Right turn ahead prohibited (R210) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Turning right is prohibited at the NEXT intersection ahead.

image:image.image:title: Right turn prohibited (R212) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Turning right is prohibited at THIS intersection.

image:image.image:title: Traffic lane arrows (GM1) — South African road marking
image:image.image:caption: Arrows show which direction you MUST travel in that lane.

image:image.image:title: Road narrows (W116) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The road narrows ahead — the total road width reduces.

image:image.image:title: Roundabout (R137) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: You are entering a roundabout. You must travel anti-clockwise and yield to vehicles already in the circle.

image:image.image:title: Secondary crossroad (W103) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A crossroad where crossing traffic has priority over you.

image:image.image:title: Sharp bend (left) (W204) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A sharp left bend ahead — more severe than a gentle curve.

image:image.image:title: Sharp bend (right) (W205) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A sharp right bend ahead.

image:image.image:title: Yield at traffic circle (R2.2) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Yield to traffic already in the traffic circle.

image:image.image:title: Yield (R2) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Give way to all traffic on the road you are entering.

image:image.image:title: Yield to pedestrians (R2.1) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: You must give priority to pedestrians crossing or about to cross.

image:image.image:title: 4-way stop (R1.4) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: All traffic from all four directions must stop fully.

image:image.image:title: 3-way stop (R1.3) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: All traffic from three directions must stop fully.

image:image.image:title: No entry (R3) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: No vehicle may enter this road or lane in this direction.

image:image.image:title: One-way roadway (right) (R4.1) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Traffic flows in one direction only. You must follow the arrow direction.

image:image.image:title: One-way roadway (left) (R4.2) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Traffic flows in one direction only — to the left.

image:image.image:title: Pedestrian priority (R5) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Pedestrians have absolute priority. Maximum speed is 15 km/h for permitted vehicles.

image:image.image:title: Keep right (R104) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: You must pass to the right of the obstruction, island or median.

image:image.image:title: Keep left (R103) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: You must pass to the left of the obstruction, island or median.

image:image.image:title: Turn right only (R109) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: You must turn right at this intersection.

image:image.image:title: Proceed straight only (R107) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: You must go straight ahead. No turning is allowed.

image:image.image:title: Turn left only (R108) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: You must turn left at this intersection.

image:image.image:title: U-turn prohibited (R213) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Turning your vehicle to face the opposite direction is prohibited here.

image:image.image:title: Parking prohibited (R216) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Parking is prohibited. You may stop briefly to drop/pick up passengers.

image:image.image:title: No dangerous-substance vehicles (temporary) (TR232) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Temporary sign: vehicles transporting dangerous (hazardous) substances are prohibited.

image:image.image:title: No goods vehicles over indicated GVM (temporary) (TR230) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Temporary sign: goods vehicles exceeding the indicated gross vehicle mass are prohibited.

image:image.image:title: Speed limit (R201) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Maximum speed limit for this road. You may not exceed this speed.

image:image.image:title: Left turn ahead prohibited (R209) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Turning left is prohibited at the NEXT intersection ahead.

image:image.image:title: 137 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 137

image:image.image:title: 138 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 138

image:image.image:title: 310 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 310

image:image.image:title: 312 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 312

image:image.image:title: 313 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 313

image:image.image:title: 314 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 314

image:image.image:title: 317 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 317

image:image.image:title: 318 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 318

image:image.image:title: 319 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 319

image:image.image:title: 325 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 325

image:image.image:title: 326 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 326

image:image.image:title: 327 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 327

image:image.image:title: 333 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 333

image:image.image:title: 375 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 375

image:image.image:title: 393 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 393

image:image.image:title: 394 — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: South African K53 road sign: 394

image:image.image:title: Skew T-junction ahead (W109) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: An angled T-junction ahead — the crossing road is not at 90°.

image:image.image:title: Slippery road (W333) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Road surface is slippery (wet, icy, polished or recently sealed).

image:image.image:title: Speed humps (W332) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Speed humps (road bumps) are ahead.

image:image.image:title: Staggered junction ahead (W112) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A staggered junction ahead — side roads are offset, not opposite each other.

image:image.image:title: Steep descent (W502) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A steep downhill gradient ahead. The gradient percentage is shown.

image:image.image:title: Stop (R1) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: All traffic must come to a complete stop.

image:image.image:title: Stopping prohibited (R217) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: No stopping allowed — stricter than parking prohibited.

image:image.image:title: Switch head lamps on (R133) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: You must switch your headlights on immediately at this point.

image:image.image:title: T-junction ahead (W104) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Your road ends at a T-junction ahead. You must turn left or right.

image:image.image:title: T-junction chevron (W409) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The road ahead does not carry on straight but merges into another road (T-junction).

image:image.image:title: Taxi parking reservation (R309-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for taxis only.

image:image.image:title: Taxi lane reservation (R351(T)) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This lane or stopping area is reserved for taxis.

image:image.image:title: Tour bus parking reservation (R319-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for tour buses only.

image:image.image:title: Tour bus reservation (R319) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This lane or bay is reserved for tour buses only.

image:image.image:title: Towed vehicles prohibited (R240) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Vehicles towing trailers or other vehicles are not permitted here.

image:image.image:title: Traffic circle ahead (W201) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A traffic circle (roundabout) ahead. Yield to vehicles already in the circle.

image:image.image:title: Traffic control: Stop ahead (W302) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A traffic officer ahead is controlling traffic with a Stop signal.

image:image.image:title: Traffic control: Yield ahead (W303) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A traffic officer ahead is controlling traffic with a Yield signal.

image:image.image:title: Traffic signals ahead (W301) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Traffic lights (robots) are ahead.

image:image.image:title: Two-way traffic ahead (W212) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The road ahead changes from one-way to two-way traffic.

image:image.image:title: Uneven roadway (W331) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Uneven road surface ahead — bumps, dips or undulations.

image:image.image:title: Hazardous substances vehicle parking reservation (R316-P) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This parking area is reserved for vehicles conveying hazardous (dangerous) substances.

image:image.image:title: Vehicle conveying dangerous goods reservation (R316) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: This lane or route is reserved for vehicles transporting dangerous goods.

image:image.image:title: Vehicles exceeding mass only (R102) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Only vehicles exceeding the stated mass may use this lane or road (e.g. an overloaded vehicle route).

image:image.image:title: Vehicles conveying dangerous goods only (R126) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Only vehicles transporting dangerous goods may use this route.

image:image.image:title: Sharp junction (road splits) (W111) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The road you are on will soon split in two and you must choose which road to take.

image:image.image:title: Sharp junction (road splits) (W113) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The road you are on will soon split in two and you must choose which road to take.

image:image.image:title: Sharp junction (merging traffic from the right) (W114) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Traffic could merge onto your road from the right at a sharp angle.

image:image.image:title: Two-way traffic crossroad (W213) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: You are on a one-way street that will be crossed by a two-way street. Oncoming vehicles may turn across your path.

image:image.image:title: Road works ahead (W311) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Road construction or maintenance work is taking place ahead. Expect delays and changed conditions.

image:image.image:title: Soft shoulders (W313) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The road shoulders (verges) are soft and unstable. Vehicles may sink or lose control if they leave the tar.

image:image.image:title: Crosswinds (W349) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Strong crosswinds expected ahead. High-sided vehicles and cyclists are especially vulnerable.

image:image.image:title: Height restricted ahead (W320) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A structure ahead has a restricted height clearance. Vehicles taller than the stated height in metres must use another route.

image:image.image:title: Length restricted ahead (W321) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A road restriction ahead limits vehicle length. Vehicles longer than the stated length in metres cannot safely negotiate this section.

image:image.image:title: Width limit (R205) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Vehicles exceeding the stated width may not use this road.

image:image.image:title: Winding road (starting left) (W208) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A series of winding bends ahead, starting with a left curve.

image:image.image:title: Winding road (starting right) (W209) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: A series of winding bends ahead, starting with a right curve.

image:image.image:title: School zone word marking (GM3-S) — South African road marking
image:image.image:caption: The word "SCHOOL" or "SLOW" painted on the road surface marks an active school zone.

image:image.image:title: Y-junction ahead (W108) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The road ahead forks into a Y-junction.

image:image.image:title: Mass limit (R202) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: Vehicles exceeding the stated gross vehicle mass (GVM) may not use this road.

image:image.image:title: Yield to oncoming traffic (R6) — South African road sign
image:image.image:caption: The road narrows to a single lane ahead used by both directions. You must yield.
